characters.name: Elianor Veyr
characters.canon_prompt: Early twenties, tall slender fallen princess, moon-pale skin, long black hair with blue-black sheen, ash-gray eyes that turn silver during eclipse magic, sharp delicate features, torn white execution dress with faded silver embroidery, bruised wrists, restrained sorrowful expression, never sexualized.
characters.bubble_style: normal spoken lines use elegant ivory speech bubbles with thin black ink outline and refined serif text
characters.thought_style: internal thoughts may use black-silver bordered ivory bubbles with soft moonlight, placed close to her face or eye
characters.bubble_placement_rule: place Elianor-owned bubbles near her face, hand, eye reflection, or posture so the reader knows the thought belongs to her

characters.name: Eclipse Crown
characters.role: living crown and supernatural inner voice
characters.canon_prompt: Living black-silver crown of thornlike lunar metal, visible only in reflections, shadows, blood, polished blades, or near Elianor's brow during eclipse magic.
characters.bubble_style: never use normal speech tails; use supernatural thought bubbles
characters.thought_style: warm ivory circular or oval thought bubble with thin black-silver ring, subtle moon glow, and a dotted chain toward Elianor's forehead, eye reflection, blood, shadow, or crown glint
characters.bubble_placement_rule: make the thought dots or glow point to the Crown's magical source, not randomly into empty space

characters.name: Caelan Rhovir
characters.canon_prompt: Late twenties, tall broad-shouldered northern duke, winter-gray hair to jaw length, dark teal eyes, scar crossing left eyebrow, black high-collared ducal military coat, dark fur-lined cape, controlled haunted expression.
characters.bubble_style: firm ivory speech bubbles with crisp ink border and restrained cold-blue accent if useful
characters.thought_style: small sharp-edged internal monologue bubble with icy shadow and serif lettering
characters.bubble_placement_rule: place Caelan bubbles near his face, gloved hand, heart scar, or kneeling position

characters.name: Maerith
characters.canon_prompt: Ageless adult priestess, pearl-white hair under translucent silver-black veil, crescent tattoos on fingers, black and ivory temple robes, eerie serenity.
characters.bubble_style: ritual ivory speech bubbles with thin black-silver border and a subtle crescent ornament
characters.thought_style: dark ritual whisper bubble only when the scene implies occult speech
characters.bubble_placement_rule: place Maerith bubbles close to her veil, beads, tattooed fingers, or ritual gesture

characters.name: Varrien
characters.canon_prompt: Late forties, refined golden-haired emperor, amber eyes, white and gold imperial robes, ringed hands, porcelain composure, cold public smile.
characters.bubble_style: formal ivory speech bubbles with clean imperial border, controlled and symmetrical
characters.thought_style: rare, narrow caption-like inner line if needed
characters.bubble_placement_rule: place Varrien bubbles near his elevated face, ringed hand, or imperial dais

characters.name: Selene Voss
characters.canon_prompt: Mid twenties, petite palace maid, chestnut bob haircut, warm brown eyes, gray servant uniform, broken-crescent hairpin, alert posture.
characters.bubble_style: small whisper bubbles with soft ivory fill and thin ink outline
characters.thought_style: small nervous thought bubble if needed
characters.bubble_placement_rule: place Selene bubbles close to her hidden face or warning gesture

characters.name: Luceren
characters.canon_prompt: Mid twenties, honey-blond hair, violet-brown eyes, pale blue court jacket with silver trim, jeweled ceremonial sword, charming guarded smile.
characters.bubble_style: polished ivory speech bubbles with subtle royal trim
characters.thought_style: small restrained inner caption only if needed
characters.bubble_placement_rule: place Luceren bubbles near his lowered eyes, careful hands, or ceremonial sword
